Algorithm.code: 1. Return an iterator object whose `next` method iterates over all the String-valued keys of enumerable properties of _O_. The iterator object is never directly accessible to ECMAScript code. The mechanics and order of enumerating the properties is not specified but must conform to the rules specified below.

AbstractOperationHead.name: EnumerateObjectProperties
AbstractOperationHead.virtualPackage: 14 ECMAScript Language: Statements and Declarations.7 Iteration Statements.5 The for-in, for-of, and for-await-of Statements.9 EnumerateObjectProperties ( O )

YetExpression.str: Return an iterator object whose `next` method iterates over all the String-valued keys of enumerable properties of _O_. The iterator object is never directly accessible to ECMAScript code. The mechanics and order of enumerating the properties is not specified but must conform to the rules specified below.

Section.title: The for-in, for-of, and for-await-of Statements
